source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the amplifier circuit shown in the <image>, the values of \(R_1\) and \(R_2\) are such that the transistor is operating at \(V_{C E}=3 \mathrm{~V}\) and \(I_C=1.5 \mathrm{~mA}\) when its \(\beta\) is 150. For a transistor with \(\beta\) of 200, the operating point \(\left(V_{C E}, I_C\right)\) is

the target answer is a pair (VCE, IC), indicating more than a single scalar lookup

registry_passed=true and the image asset exists, so the needed materials are present for downstream verification
